# CuPy : NumPy & SciPy for GPU

[CuPy](https://cupy.dev/) is a NumPy/SciPy-compatible array library for GPU-accelerated computing with Python.

This is a CuPy wheel (precompiled binary) package for CUDA 12.x.
You need to install [CUDA Toolkit 12.x](https://developer.nvidia.com/cuda-toolkit-archive) to use these packages.

If you have another version of CUDA, or want to build from source, refer to the [Installation Guide](https://docs.cupy.dev/en/latest/install.html) for instructions.
